case_title: DOUGLAS LAM VS. STEPHAN OLIVER LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-23-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-07-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APPEARS; NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; JPT: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: B. PAREDES; NOT REPORTED
DECLARATION TO CORRECT ADDRESS OF DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAM, DOUGLAS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LAM, DOUGLAS AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, STEPHAN OLIVER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-23-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAM, DOUGLAS AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, STEPHAN OLIVER
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAM, DOUGLAS AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, STEPHAN OLIVER
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-25-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, STEPHAN OLIVER
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 04/23/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "FORWARD TIME EXP - REN TO SEND."

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-07-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-07-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DOUGLAS LAM. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. EXHIBITS BY PLAINTIFF RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: BERTHA PAREDES; NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAM, DOUGLAS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOPEZ, STEPHAN OLIVER PLAINTIFF DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT THE CITIZEN ARREST WAS UNLAWFUL, OR THAT DEFENDANT WAS OTHERWISE RESPONSIBLE FOR HIS INJURIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, STEPHAN OLIVER
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY LAM, DOUGLAS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-04-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
